description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a mix of light gray brickwork and dark stone cladding, with extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows and doors on the front and side facades. A prominent balcony with a railing overlooks the main entrance, which is recessed and framed by darker stone. The house includes a large paved area in front, possibly a driveway or patio, and a rectangular section that could serve as a garage or storage. The rear of the house is simpler, with fewer windows and a more utilitarian appearance. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of gray brick and dark stone cladding. The design is minimalist, with a prominent balcony and a spacious paved area in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, balcony, and a mix of brick and stone cladding.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal windows, a flat roof, and a large paved area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade, balcony, and the main paved area in front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a full-height glass wall and a flat roof, adjacent to the paved area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door framed by dark stone, no visible steps, with a balcony above and no porch or columns.
